model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DEPTH = 3","old":"DEPTH = 2","op":"replace_exact","source":"solution.py","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","op":"replace_exact","source":"solution.py","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","op":"replace_exact","source":"solution.py","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 256","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","op":"replace_exact","source":"solution.py","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","op":"replace_exact","source":"solution.py","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"solution.py","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"solution.py","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase MLP capacity for the fixed-step budget, and pair it with a stronger AdamW setup so the model can fit CIFAR-10 faster within 256 steps.","secondary_modes":["topk","indexing","caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 3","new":"DEPTH = 2","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 256","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["indexing","topk","caching"],"rationale":"Back off the last run's over-expansion and dropout, while keeping AdamW and a slightly smaller step size. This should restore stability and give a more balanced MLP for the 256-step budget."}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["indexing"],"rationale":"The last run improved after stabilizing the model, so the next low-risk move is to increase the step size slightly and see if the fixed 256-step budget converges faster without changing the architecture again."}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 2","new":"DEPTH = 3","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 20","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Keep the stable optimizer settings from the better run, but add one more hidden layer and a slightly narrower base width to raise representational power without returning to the overgrown, unstable configuration.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 3","new":"DEPTH = 2","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 20","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":["layout","topk"],"rationale":"Restore the better-performing two-layer, wider-but-not-huge MLP, then try a larger batch to reduce gradient noise under the fixed 256-step budget.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"The batch-128 run was a clear gain, so the next low-complexity test is whether an even larger batch further reduces gradient noise within the same 256-step budget.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Batch scaling has been the strongest signal so far, so the next simple test is whether another doubling further improves stability and loss within the fixed step budget.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Batch scaling has improved every time so far, so the next simplest probe is whether one more doubling further reduces loss under the same fixed-step budget.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 2048","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Batch-size doubling has remained beneficial, and 1024 is still improving, so one more doubling is the simplest remaining probe before changing the optimizer or architecture again.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"    total_steps = steps_per_epoch * 100","new":"    total_steps = steps_per_epoch * 10","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"summaries","secondary_modes":["topk"],"rationale":"The very large batch is working, so the next low-complexity move is to make the cosine schedule actually span the fixed training horizon instead of stretching far beyond it.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["summaries"],"rationale":"The cosine schedule hurt, so revert it and test a slightly higher learning rate in the strong 2048-batch setting where the model has already been stable.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"The large-batch run is still improving with a slightly higher step size, so probe one more small upward adjustment before touching the more expensive batch setting again.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 9e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":["topk"],"rationale":"The 9e-4 step was slightly worse than the previous best, so revert to the better learning rate and reduce weight decay in the large-batch regime where regularization may now be too strong.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"indexing","secondary_modes":["topk"],"rationale":"The large-batch run is stable, so make AdamW a bit more responsive on this short fixed-step horizon by lowering the second-moment beta.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.95)","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"indexing","secondary_modes":["topk"],"rationale":"The large-batch regime responded to a lower beta2, so test a more responsive second-moment estimate while keeping the rest of the tuned setup fixed.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.95)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 2e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":["indexing"],"rationale":"Restore the better-adapting moment estimate and loosen regularization a bit in the large-batch regime, which has been the most successful part of the run.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 28","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 2e-5","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["caching"],"rationale":"The optimizer has effectively plateaued, so restore the slightly better regularization and give the MLP a modest width increase to see if more capacity can still pay off.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 28","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 2048","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 3072","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":["layout"],"rationale":"Undo the width increase that hurt, then continue the batch-size scaling trend one more step beyond 2048, which has been the clearest source of gains in this run.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 3072","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 4096","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Batch scaling has been the most reliable improvement axis, and the 3072 run was still moving in the right direction, so one last doubling is the simplest remaining shot.","source":"solution.py"}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 4096","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 8192","anchor":"","text":"","source":"solution.py"}],"primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Batch scaling has been the dominant signal all run, and 4096 was still improving, so one final doubling is the simplest remaining shot for a lower verified loss.","source":"solution.py"}
